is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/analyze/AlterTableRenameColumnAnalyzer.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['if (tableInfo.versionCreated().before(DocTableInfo.COLUMN_OID_VERSION)) {', '"Renaming columns of a table created before version " + DocTableInfo.COLUMN_OID_VERSION + " is not supported"'], removed_lines=['import org.elasticsearch.Version;', 'if (tableInfo.versionCreated().before(Version.V_5_5_0)) {', '"Renaming columns of a table created before version 5.5 is not supported"'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/execution/ddl/tables/TransportAddColumnAction.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import io.crate.metadata.doc.DocTableInfo;', 'doctableInfo.versionCreated().onOrAfter(DocTableInfo.COLUMN_OID_VERSION) ?'], removed_lines=['import org.elasticsearch.Version;', 'doctableInfo.versionCreated().onOrAfter(Version.V_5_5_0) ?'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/execution/dml/Indexer.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['this.writeOids = table.versionCreated().onOrAfter(DocTableInfo.COLUMN_OID_VERSION);'], removed_lines=['this.writeOids = table.versionCreated().onOrAfter(Version.V_5_5_0);'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/metadata/doc/DocTableInfo.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['/**', '* Tables created on or after this version use oids in the mapping', '**/', 'public static final Version COLUMN_OID_VERSION = Version.V_5_5_0;', ''], removed_lines=[], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None), FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/metadata/doc/DocTableInfoFactory.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['import static org.elasticsearch.cluster.metadata.Metadata.COLUMN_OID_UNASSIGNED;', '', '// Versions up to 5.9.7 had a bug where ALTER TABLE on a partitioned table could change the `versionCreated` property on the template.', '// See https://github.com/crate/crate/pull/17178', '// To mitigate the impact, this looks through partitions and takes their lowest version:', 'for (String indexName : concreteIndices) {', 'IndexMetadata indexMetadata = metadata.index(indexName);', 'if (indexMetadata != null) {', 'versionCreated = Version.min(versionCreated, indexMetadata.getCreationVersion());', '}', '}', 'if (indexTemplateMetadata != null && versionCreated.onOrAfter(DocTableInfo.COLUMN_OID_VERSION)) {', '// Due to https://github.com/crate/crate/pull/17178 the created version in the template', '// can be wrong; inferring the correct version from partitions can also fail if old partitions', '// are deleted.', "// This is another safety mechanism. If a column doesn't have OIDs the table must be from < 5.5.0", 'if (references.values().stream().anyMatch(ref -> ref.oid() == COLUMN_OID_UNASSIGNED)) {', 'versionCreated = Version.V_5_4_0;', '}', '}'], removed_lines=[], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
